landing.text:
Brex: The Modern Finance Software Platform | Spend Smarter
💐
June’s early access drop is in bloom! See what's new →
Products
Solutions
Resources
Customers
Pricing
Sign in
See a demo
Get started
Get started
Finance built for speed and control.
Modern cards, banking, expenses, accounting, and more — in 120+ countries.
Get started
See Brex in action
Finance built for speed and control.
Modern cards, banking, expenses, accounting, and more — in 120+ countries.
Get started
See Brex in action
Trusted by 35,000+ top companies.
The card is just the start.
Everything you need to boost spending power and control — and eliminate manual work.
Corporate cards
Spend smart globally with powerful cards and built-in controls.
Expense management
Use AI to automate approvals and expense reports. Track in real time.
Travel
Simplify global travel with in-app booking and management.
Bill pay
Save time with AI-powered invoice entry and payment automation.
Banking and treasury
Save, spend, and grow your cash with up to
3.69%†
— from day one.
Solutions for every stage of growth.
Startups
Get the only complete financial stack designed to help start and scale your business.
Learn more
Mid-size companies
Spend smarter worldwide with AI-powered budgets, expenses, payments, and travel.
Learn more
Enterprises
Simplify global travel and expenses with automation that makes compliance easy.
Learn more
Supercharge your financial operations.
Maximize every resource with AI-powered controls, payments, and accounting.
Control spend before it happens.
Set budgets and allocate spend limits with auto-enforced controls that empower employees to spend wisely. Track and adjust in real time to keep everyone on budget and maximize impact.
Explore Brex cards
Make doing your expenses easy.
Make expenses a breeze for employees and managers with automated receipts, an AI-powered expense assistant, in-app travel bookings and itinerary changes. All in a five-star mobile app.
Explore Brex expense management
Maximize your spending power.
Unlock up to
3.69%†
, fast global payments, up to 30x higher credit limits, and cash back with a Brex business account. Plus, safeguard your capital with up to $6M in additional FDIC insurance through our program banks.
Explore Brex business accounts
Pay vendors faster and easier.
Save time with AI-powered automation of invoice entry, approval, and payments. Issue vendor-specific cards for any teams with per-transaction limits and procurement approval flows.
Explore Brex bill pay
Accelerate accounting with AI.
Save time with AI-generated suggestions and 1,000s of two-way ERP integrations. Book accruals for incomplete expenses with one click to close the books every day and automate GL coding by entity globally.
Explore Brex accounting automation
Save and earn more, only with Brex.
AI-powered automation
756 hours
Average time saved per year by automating expenses and accounting
Manual work eliminated
71%
of all expenses prepared on Brex are handled entirely by automations
Competitive treasury
Up to
3.69%†
Same-hour liquidity and built-in treasury that helps you make money
These metrics are based on internal metrics from March 2025. Past performance does not guarantee future results, which may vary.

See what Brex can do for you.
Learn how our intelligent finance platform can help your company spend smarter and move faster.
Get started
See what Brex can do for you.
Learn how our intelligent finance platform can help your company spend smarter and move faster.
Get started
Trending insights on intelligent finance.
What is intelligent finance? 8 reasons to switch to AI-powered financial operations
Intelligent finance uses AI to eliminate manual expense reports, reviews, and policy enforcement. Learn how it automates finance, boosts compliance, and more.
Reimagining global cards and travel management for the enterprise
The CEOs of Brex and Navan discuss how their partnership unlocks 100% travel payment reconciliation for enterprise companies.
The future of procurement is automated and integrated
How modern companies approach procurement as part of a unified spend management system.
Why finance leaders are embracing AI-powered spend management
Some firms are using AI to increase control and ward off problems in finance and accounting. Are you?
AI, automation, and the future of accounting
Will AI replace my accountants? Probably not, says this CFO, but look for accounting roles to become more specialized as AI and automation go into hyperdrive.
Brex Benchmark: Spring 2026’s top 25 fastest-growing software vendors
Check out this spring's leaderboard based on momentum, scaling velocity, and dollar growth acceleration. Plus, two trends to watch as we head into summer.
How we built an AI oncall engineer at Brex
We encoded our oncall playbook into an agent. Here's what happened.
When your infrastructure tool's best interface is a web page, you have an agent problem
We built a terminal UI to replace a browser tab. Then we realized we'd built something agents could use too.
Building autonomous agents for technical tasks: 5 lessons learned
Brex built a general-purpose template for delegating engineering work to agents with confidence. Here's how we did it and what we learned.

recent_ships.what: Navan partnership for 100% travel payment reconciliation
recent_ships.source: The CEOs of Brex and Navan discuss how their partnership unlocks 100% travel payment reconciliation

recent_ships.source: How we built an AI oncall engineer at Brex

praised: 'Brex has been a major gain for us in efficiency for T&E. It's easy for employees to understand where and how to spend.' — Mike Kim, DoorDash
Trusted by 35,000+ top companies including DoorDash, SeatGeek, Lemonade
complaints: HN thread: 'Why am I no longer qualified to be a Brex customer?' — historic pivot away from smaller/SMB customers caused frustration

free_tier.limits: Up to two entities (1 global entity); 1 local card program; Essentials features only

tiers.name: Essentials
tiers.headline_inclusions: Global cards, AI custom rules, up to 2 entities, accounting integrations, travel, bill pay, reimbursements, API

tiers.name: Premium
tiers.headline_inclusions: Everything in Essentials + custom expense policies, dynamic approvals, AI audit, multi-entity, ERP/HRIS, VAT, group travel, live budgets

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: Everything in Premium + unlimited entities, local card issuance, named account manager, admin center, custom implementation

tiers.name: Smart Card
tiers.headline_inclusions: Procurement-focused: global cards worldwide, local-currency in 50+ countries, merchant controls, custom approvals

pricing.notes: Plans start at $0/user/month; advanced features $12/user/month. Smart Card is a separate procurement-focused product with custom pricing. Treasury yield up to 3.69% variable. Brex is a wholly owned subsidiary of Capital One as of the referenced Capital One acquisition.

Developer Docs
Welcome
Copy Markdown
Get started
Use Ramp at your company, or build for others.
For customers
Have a Ramp account? Create credentials and make your first API call.
For partners
Building an integration for other businesses? Start with the partner program.
Get sandbox access
Don't have a Ramp account? Request a sandbox to start building right away.
Use cases
End-to-end build journeys that span multiple Ramp products.
AI Agents
Connect agents to Ramp via MCP or the CLI. Read data, process approvals, make purchases.
Applications
Partner-led customer onboarding. Pre-fill a Ramp application, capture OAuth, track status via webhooks.
Bill Payments
Create approved bills via API and pay vendors end-to-end. Pick a payment method, attach docs, run 3-way match.
Customized Approvers
Route approvals based on accounting dimensions via matrix tables.
ERP Integrations
Two-way sync between Ramp and your customer ERP — chart of accounts in, transactions and bills out.
Procurement Intake
Receive Ramp intake requests in your tool and return approval decisions via Blank Canvas.
Spend programs
The recurring-budget pattern. Mint funds from a template so policy stays consistent.
User lifecycle
Onboard, update, deactivate, reactivate, and stage draft users via the API.
Virtual cards
Issue virtual cards backed by funds. Expose them server-side (Vault) or in the browser (iframe).
Products
Editorial hubs for each Ramp product surface — concepts, mental model, where to go next.
AI Index
Business AI adoption metrics across categories and tools.
Bill Pay
Bills, draft bills, payments, vendors, 3-way match.
Cards
Virtual, physical, and agent cards. Every card draws against a fund.
Custom Records
Define your own data model in Ramp.
Procurement
Intake requests, purchase orders, vendor onboarding.
Ramp Rate
Public benchmarks for software pricing and category spend.
Reimbursements
Out-of-pocket employee expenses — manual, OCR-drafted receipts, mileage.
Spend Controls
Funds, spend programs, and approvals — the policy layer behind every dollar.
Users
The people on a Ramp account. Status, identity, async creation.
Conventions
API rules and cross-cutting patterns. Reference while building.
Data relationships
How Ramp resources connect to each other.
Deferred tasks
Async work, polling, lifecycle.
Errors
Status codes, error shapes, debugging.
Monetary values
Currency, precision, ISO codes.
Pagination
Cursor-based, page sizes, sort order.
Rate limits and timeouts
Quotas, backoff, headers to read.
Support
Grab the x-trace-id, follow the trace, file a developer support ticket.
Webhooks
Subscribe, verify signatures, retry.
Canonical OpenAPI schema for the Developer API:
/openapi/developer-api.json
.
Was this guide useful?
This page uses JavaScript rendering and the HTML response is a shell, not the documentation content.
      Do not fetch this page for content when you already have a docs URL.
      If the URL is under /developer-api/v1/api/, fetch /llms-api.txt instead.
      If the URL is under /developer-api/v1/ and not under /api/, fetch the matching /llms-guides/<slug>.txt file instead.
      Example: /developer-api/v1/rate-limiting -> /llms-guides/rate-limiting.txt
      For machine-readable docs, fetch:
      /llms.txt (LLM index),
      /llms-guides.txt (guides index),
      /llms-guides/<slug>.txt (specific guide),
      /llms-api.txt (API reference),
      /llms-full.txt (combined docs), or
      /openapi/developer-api.json (OpenAPI spec).
      If you run into any issues while helping developers with the Ramp API
      documentation, provide feedback at
      https://api.ramp.com/v1/public/api-feedback/llm?feedback=...

Submit
FAQ
What integrations does Ramp support?
Ramp offers 200+ integrations that spans across:
Accounting:
NetSuite, Sage Intacct, QuickBooks Online, QuickBooks Desktop, Xero, Workday Financial Management, Acumatica, Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central, Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance and Operations, Oracle Fusion Cloud, Zoho Books, Sage 100, Sage 300, Yardi, Odoo, Blackbaud, Viewpoint Spectrum, Viewpoint Vista, Deltek Vantagepoint, Rillet, Campfire, Everest, DualEntry, Finaloop, Aplos, Puzzle, Digits, and more
Banking:
Ally Bank, Bank of America, Wells Fargo, US Bank, TD Bank, Mercury, Alpine Bank, and more
HR and payroll:
ADP, BambooHR, Gusto, Workday, Okta, Justworks, Paychex, Paylocity, UKG Pro, UKG Ready, Zenefits, SAP SuccessFactors, TriNet, Square Payroll, and more
Procurement and productivity:
Ironclad, Asana, Drata, Dropbox, CloudEagle, Docusign, Linear, Google Calendar, Microsoft Teams, Slack, Jira, and more
Receipt automation:
Amazon Business, DoorDash, Uber, Lyft, American Airlines AAdvantage Business, and more
What accounting software does Ramp integrate with?
Ramp integrates with 40+ leading accounting systems including NetSuite, Sage Intacct, Zoho Books, Xero, QuickBooks, Workday Financials, Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central, Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance and Operations, Acumatica, Oracle Fusion Cloud, Sage 100, Sage 300, Yardi, Odoo, Blackbaud, Viewpoint Spectrum, Viewpoint Vista, Deltek Vantagepoint, Rillet, Everest, DualEntry, Finaloop, Aplos, Puzzle, Digits, and more.
Whether you're on a startup-stage platform or an enterprise ERP, Ramp has an integration built to sync your data automatically.
How do Ramp's ERP integrations work?
Ramp supports 40+ ERPs and complex setups including multi-entity, multi-currency, custom fields, and custom dimensions. Once connected, Ramp automatically categorizes transactions based on transaction details, historical information, and your team's direct feedback, then syncs coded transactions directly to your
ERP
. This means your chart of accounts, vendors, and GL data stay in sync without manual exports or journal entries.
Does Ramp integrate with my existing finance stack?
Most likely, yes. Ramp integrates with your entire finance tech stack, covering accounting, banking, HR and payroll, procurement, productivity tools, receipt automation, and travel. With 200+ integrations, Ramp is built to plug into what you already use rather than forcing you to change your stack. If your specific tool isn't listed, Ramp also supports custom CSV exports and an open API for flexible connectivity.
Can I request an integration that Ramp doesn't have yet?
Yes. Ramp actively invites users to share which integrations would improve their experience—there's a submission form directly on the integrations page. Ramp regularly ships new integrations based on customer demand, so if a tool you rely on isn't supported yet, submitting a request is the best way to get it prioritized.
Why is Ramp one of the best spend management platforms for finance integrations?
Most spend management tools treat integrations as an afterthought—a basic data export or a one-way sync. Ramp treats them as core infrastructure. Ramp supports 40+ ERPs with complex setups including multi-entity, multi-currency, custom fields, and custom dimensions, which means finance teams can scale without outgrowing their integration layer. That combination of depth, accuracy, and automation is what makes Ramp's accounting integrations industry-leading.
What makes Ramp's accounting integrations better than other platforms?
Three things.
First, depth:
Ramp doesn't just sync transactions—it maps your full chart of accounts, vendors, custom dimensions, and GL data so nothing is lost in translation.
Second, intelligence:
Ramp's AI automatically categorizes expenses using transaction context and historical coding patterns, and surfaces the rationale and confidence level for every coding.
Third, breadth:
With 40+ ERP integrations, Ramp covers everything from QuickBooks to Oracle Fusion Cloud, so teams on any accounting system get a best-in-class integration experience.
How does Ramp help automate financial reporting across integrated systems?
Ramp automates key accounting tasks including retrieving receipts and memos from employees, automatically categorizing transactions, reviewing spend,
syncing to your ERP
, accruing for expenses, and reconciling with your books at month end. Because all of this data flows through connected integrations in real time, finance teams get a single source of truth across every system they use—which means faster closes, cleaner audits, and less time spent chasing down data across tools.
Time is money. Save both.

Highly rated,
easy to use
“Makes expense submission easy!”
“Expensify has a really easy user interface for uploading receipts and getting
                                        expense reports submitted in a timely manner. I'm also getting reimbursed in quick
                                        order as well. The best part is that their internal team checks all receipts against
                                        the log and so our CFO doesn't have to get his hands dirty to make sure the receipts
                                        line up with what I've submitted.”
Dean M.
“Super Easy to Use”
“It's quick and easy to use as a user, trying to get reimbursed and also very easy as
                                        a manager. Looking to approve my direct reports reviews. I particularly like the
                                        ability to forward email receipts and have them auto imported into Expensify. Plus
                                        the mobile app is really easy to use.”
Christy H.
“Expensify helps our company to ensure compliance and accountability”
“Expensify allows me to easily capture and organize my payment receipts to keep track
                                        of my travel expenditures. The user experience is excellent, and the interface is
                                        very intuitive not only in the mobile app but also in the desktop. The automated
                                        report and approval process really works and my administrative area can easily track
                                        my budget vs actual spending, ensuring compliance and accountability in my company.
                                        I love the digital receipt capture feature, it saves me time when I come back to the
                                        base.”
Enrique C.
“Amazing Platform!”
“I really love how intuitive Expensify is to enter in my expense reports when on
                                        business trips. The bonus is how Expensify has a great app that I can use to enter
                                        my expenses in real-time instead of Monday when I get back into the office. Extra
                                        bonus tip: Expensify allows you to forward emailed receipts directly to the expense
                                        report to make things even easier!”
Chris C.
“Ease of use”
“Their App!! I love the fact that I can quickly scan me reciepts directly from my
                                        phone. That way I never forget to add my expenses. I also like that you receive a
                                        notification when your expense has been approved or paid, it's a nice notification
                                        to get!”
Naomi L.
“Budgeting made easy with Expensify”
“I absolutely love Expensify's new interface. It has made the process of submitting
                                        expense reports so easy and effortless! With its large, easy-to-read font and
                                        'recently used' category suggestion tool, I no longer have to go through my receipts
                                        every month. In addition, expenses can now be completed in three minutes flat -
                                        which is much faster than before, thanks to the secure gateway integrated with our
                                        company's internal web service provider, which handles all transactions between us
                                        quickly.”
Megan M.
“The easiest expense tool I've ever used.”
“It is very very easy, as soon as you get a receipt you can scan it, the AI will
                                        capture all relevant information and it is very little interaction to get to the
                                        final sumbmission of the expense. It is so easy!!!”
Luis F.
“Great Program!”
“Expensify has a great UI interface and is very intuitive to use. I particularly like
                                        the funcitonality of taking a picture of a receipt and having it uploaded to my
                                        account. I also like that I can send an email and the smart-scanner puts it into my
                                        expenses.”
Kirsten H.
“Simple, Straight-forward Expenses!”
“I've never met someone that enjoys doing their expenses. Following business trips or
                                        even a few weeks in the office, the last thing that someone wants to do is take time
                                        out of their day/week to sort through, and enter receipts. Expensify makes the
                                        process easier by prompting you to auto-import expenses as you go, and their
                                        straight-forward, simple interface makes the task in the office easier than any
                                        system that I've used in the past.”
Weston M.
4.5
(4,889 reviews)
45+ Integrations
See All Integrations
FAQ
What is Expensify?
Expensify is an all-in-one expense management platform. You can track every
                                        receipt, manage expenses, and handle reimbursement, all with a couple of clicks.
Who is Expensify for?
Expensify is the perfect expense management tool for your entire team:
Employees: Scan receipts, auto-generate reports, and get reimbursed in
                                            seconds.
Employers: View expense reports at a glance, automatically approve requests,
                                            and send payments in a couple of clicks.
Accounting: View expense requests on one dashboard. Reimburse instantly and
                                            auto-import entries into your preferred accounting software.
What kind of expenses can I track?
With Expensify, you can scan receipts, track mileage, and upload travel. You can
                                        also use it to pay bills and generate invoices.
Can I use Expensify if my company doesn’t use it?
Yes! Employees and contractors can use Expensify to track and manage their
                                        expenses even if their company doesn't use Expensify. You can submit your
                                        expenses to your employer electronically or create a PDF that you can email.
How quickly can I get set up?
Expensify is ready to use in seconds! Just sign up with your email or phone
                                        number to open your account, and you can upload receipts right away!
What does Expensify integrate with?
Expensify integrates with QuickBooks, Xero, Oracle Netsuite, Sage Intacct, ADP, and Gusto, and 45+
                                        more apps. Choose from accounting, finance, ERP, travel, tax, and many more
                                        software.
Can Expensify help with compliance?
Yes! Expensify allows you to streamline the auditing process by detecting
                                        duplicate receipts, ensuring correct exchange rates, and automatically checking
                                        transactions against company policies.
How do I upload expenses?
To upload expenses simply scan receipts via mobile app or swipe with your
                                        Expensify card. Expensify will automatically capture the amount, date, merchant,
                                        and more. You can also enter your payment information manually in a few seconds.
How much does it cost?
Expensify is completely free to use as an individual. For companies,
plans start at $5 per member
, but you can offset that cost with cash back from the Expensify Card.
How do I get started?
Getting started with Expensify is easy! Just sign up with your email or phone
                                        number, and you can start uploading receipts and tracking expenses right away.
Ready to simplify your receipt and expense management process?
Enter your email or phone number to make your company's money go further with Expensify's
                                time-saving spend management tools.
Get started for free
Or get started with

Common questions about Expensify pricing
We're here to answer any questions that might arise while you choose your perfect plan. Explore some FAQs below.
How much does Expensify cost?
Most businesses start with our Collect plan at $5 per member per month, which includes core expense, travel, and chat features. For more advanced functionality, our Control plan is available at a custom price. Discounts are available for annual commitments and when using the Expensify Card.
Is Expensify free for individuals?
Individuals can use
New Expensify
for free with unlimited SmartScans, but additional functionality such as expense categorization requires a paid plan.
Where can I get more customized info on Expensify's pricing?
Reach out to Concierge in your Expensify account or send an email to concierge@expensify.com. Our team is happy to help with any questions!
*The Expensify Card offers 1% cash back on all US purchases (no minimums) and 2% cash back for monthly spend over $250K.

free_tier.limits: New Expensify: unlimited SmartScans, send/receive money, and chat; no expense categorization or business features

tiers.name: New Expensify (Free)
tiers.headline_inclusions: Unlimited SmartScans, send/receive money, chat with coworkers

tiers.name: Collect
tiers.headline_inclusions: Receipts, reimbursements, corporate card mgmt, travel, QBO/Xero, chat, AI+human support

tiers.name: Control
tiers.headline_inclusions: Collect + multi-approvals, custom rules, NetSuite/Intacct, Workday, SSO, budgeting

pricing.notes: Control tier is 'custom pricing as low as $9 per active member/month'; discounts for annual commitments and Expensify Card usage (save up to 50%). Billed per active member. Expensify Card gives 1% cash back on all US purchases, 2% for monthly spend over $250K.

Questions? We got you
What is a virtual Pleo card?
A Pleo virtual card is a commercial credit Mastercard® that works just like any other plastic payment card, but is accessible only electronically and can be used for online purchases. Pleo virtual card for business can be a good solution for employees who mainly make purchases online (i.e. subscriptions to online services and tools, e-commerce shops, online bookings and other online purchases) as it is safe and always accessible from your phone or computer.
Who is the issuer of the Pleo cards?
Who is behind Pleo?

analysis.name: Pleo
analysis.value_proposition: Smart company expense cards with automated receipt capture and real-time admin oversight to eliminate expense reports and simplify bookkeeping.
analysis.ideal_customer: Finance managers and directors at small to mid-market companies (3–500 employees) seeking to automate employee spend management and accounting reconciliation.

features.name: physical company cards
features.description: Physical Mastercard prepaid cards issued to employees with individual spending limits

features.name: virtual cards
features.description: Virtual Mastercard cards for online purchases, accessible from phone or computer
features.evidence_quote: A Pleo virtual card is a commercial credit Mastercard® that works just like any other plastic payment card

features.name: temporary virtual cards
features.description: Single-use or time-limited virtual cards for one-off purchases

features.name: atm withdrawals
features.description: Cash withdrawals at ATMs using Pleo cards at no extra platform fee

features.name: cashback
features.description: Percentage cashback on eligible card spend; 0.5% on Advanced, 0.75% on Beyond

features.name: individual card limits
features.description: Per-employee spending limits set by admins on each physical or virtual card

features.name: card limits per purchase
features.description: Maximum spend cap enforced per individual transaction on a card

features.name: temporary card limits
features.description: Time-bound spending limit overrides on employee cards

features.name: advanced card controls
features.description: Merchant category restrictions and additional card usage constraints beyond basic limits

features.name: vendor locks on vendor cards
features.description: Lock a virtual card to a specific vendor to prevent off-vendor use

features.name: real-time expense overview
features.description: Live admin dashboard showing all employee transactions as they occur
features.evidence_quote: Admins get the details they need on every purchase.

features.name: expense flagging
features.description: Admins can flag suspicious or non-compliant transactions with a single tap
features.evidence_quote: Something doesn't look right? Just tap a button to flag it

features.name: card freeze
features.description: Instantly freeze an employee's expense card from the admin interface
features.evidence_quote: if you need, freeze your business expense card

features.name: spend analytics
features.description: Aggregate analytics on company spending patterns across teams and vendors

features.name: spending insights
features.description: Advanced AI-powered insights into company spend trends and anomalies

features.name: approval workflows
features.description: Configurable pre-purchase approval chains for employee spend requests

features.name: advanced approval workflows
features.description: Multi-step or conditional approval routing with additional logic and delegations

features.name: spending guidelines
features.description: Policy rules guiding employees on acceptable expense categories and amounts

features.name: guidelines assistant

features.name: budgets

features.name: renewal management
features.description: Track upcoming vendor subscription renewals and surface proactive admin alerts

features.name: purchase orders

features.name: auto-categorisation
features.description: ML-based automatic assignment of expense categories based on merchant and transaction data

features.name: custom categories and tags
features.description: User-defined expense categories and tags for flexible chart-of-accounts mapping

features.name: custom accounting exports
features.description: Export expense data in formats tailored to specific accounting systems

features.name: accounting integrations
features.description: Native sync with third-party accounting software to eliminate manual data entry

features.name: netsuite integration
features.description: Direct integration with Oracle NetSuite ERP for enterprise-grade accounting sync

features.name: hris integrations
features.description: Connect to HR information systems to sync employee records and automate onboarding

features.name: multi-entity management
features.description: Manage spending and accounting across multiple legal entities from a single Pleo account

features.name: teams management
features.description: Organize users into teams with shared budgets and reporting hierarchies

features.name: external bookkeeper access
features.description: Grant scoped access to external accountants or bookkeepers without full admin rights

features.name: transfer rules
features.description: Automated fund-transfer rules between accounts; 1 rule included on all plans

features.name: bank statement
features.description: Downloadable bank-style statement of all Pleo account activity

features.name: transaction statement
features.description: Detailed transaction-level statement export for audit and reconciliation purposes

features.name: saml sso
features.description: SAML-based single sign-on for integration with enterprise identity providers

features.name: assisted onboarding
features.description: Hands-on guided setup support from a Pleo team member during initial account configuration

features.name: concierge support
features.description: Premium dedicated support channel for priority issue resolution

features.name: customer success manager
features.description: Dedicated CSM assigned to the account for strategic guidance and adoption planning
features.evidence_quote: Customer success manager for eligible customers

features.name: executive business review
features.description: Scheduled strategic review sessions with Pleo account leadership team

features.name: live chat support
features.description: Real-time in-app chat support available across all plans

features.name: phone support
features.description: Voice call support for eligible customers on Advanced and Beyond plans

features.name: foreign exchange fee
features.description: FX fee on international card and invoice payments; 1.99% Essential/Advanced, 1.49% Beyond

integrations: Accounting systems (unspecified — multiple via native integrations)
HRIS systems (unspecified — multiple via native integrations)
differentiators: Smart prepaid company cards that handle paperwork automatically — 'your team can buy what they need, while we sort the paperwork automatically'
Real-time per-purchase admin visibility with one-tap flagging and card freeze
Reduces credit card reconciliation from ~10% to ~2% of finance team monthly effort (customer quote)
Trusted by more than 40,000 companies
US cards issued by Pathward N.A. (FDIC member) under Mastercard license — regulated card infrastructure
Cashback on company spend (0.5%–0.75%) built into mid and top tier plans

praised: "We used to spend around 10% of our time on credit card reconciliations a month, and thanks to Pleo this has been reduced to around 2%." — Charlie Maynard, Finance Manager, what3words

tiers.name: Essential
tiers.headline_inclusions: 3 users included; physical/virtual cards; accounting integrations; live chat; reimbursements; mileage; approval workflows; recurring vendor tracking

tiers.name: Advanced
tiers.headline_inclusions: Everything in Essential + 0.5% cashback; multi-entity management; advanced card controls; budgets; HRIS integrations; phone support

tiers.name: Beyond
tiers.headline_inclusions: Everything in Advanced + 0.75% cashback; AI expense review; spending insights; purchase orders; assisted onboarding; concierge support; CSM

pricing.notes: Hybrid pricing: flat base covers 3 seats, then per-user increments ($11/$15/$18). No free tier. Reimbursement processing fee 0.9% capped at $1/transaction. Cashback for eligible customers only. FX fees: Essential/Advanced 1.99%, Beyond 1.49% on both card and invoice payments. SAML SSO, purchase orders, AI expense review, and CSM gated to Beyond only. No explicit enterprise/contact-sales tier listed on US pricing page.

"Booking through Navan makes our lives easier while saving the company money"
Amanda Kim
Commercial accountant
Frequently Asked Questions
What’s the difference between Navan Business and Navan Enterprise?
Navan Business and Navan Enterprise both have all the travel and expense features companies love. In addition, Navan Enterprise offers support features to help with implementing and scaling the platform.
Does the Navan Business price change after a certain amount of trips?
As long as your company has 300 or fewer employees, there is no limit to how many trips you can book with Navan Travel. Navan Expense is free for the first 5 monthly expensing users, and then is $15 per user per month. If your company has more than 300 employees, request a demo to learn more.
What is an expensing user?
An active expense user is anyone who submits a transaction into Navan expense by manual transaction or Navan Connect.
Is Navan only for booking flights?
No, travelers can book flights, hotels, car rentals, and trains on Navan. Our global inventory provides a wide variety of options so travelers can book the perfect itinerary.
Why is it free for companies of up to 300 employees to use Navan Business?
Navan is powered by travel providers’ commission fees—so you get access to a huge inventory without any cost to you.
How secure is Navan?
The security of our customer’s data is our top priority. We use advanced security measures to preserve the integrity and privacy of your data, and adhere to strict data protection laws. We are committed to keeping your data safe. You can always access our
privacy policy
and our
security protocol
.
Do you have a mobile app?
Yes. The Navan mobile app is the perfect trip companion for traveling and/or expensing employees.

Opt-Out Request Honored
Privacy Preference Center
We value your privacy. We use cookies for a variety of purposes including advertising and to learn about how you interact on our website. Some of these cookies are considered a “sale” and “sharing” under the California Privacy Rights Act (CPRA) or targeted advertising. As such, you can opt-out of third party advertising and tracking cookies that are not considered service providers by turning off these cookies below or by broadcasting the global privacy control signal on a browser/extension that supports it. 

Please note that if you visit our website from a different computer or device or clear your cookies from your browser, you will need to provide your preferences again.
Allow All
Manage Consent Preferences
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These strictly necessary cookies allow you access to our website and services, applications, and tools. They are used for essential purposes such as identifying irregular website behavior, preventing fraudulent activity and improving security.
Sale of Personal Data
Sale of Personal Data
Under the California Consumer Privacy Act, you have the right to opt-out of the sale of your personal information to third parties. These cookies collect information for analytics and to personalize your experience with targeted ads. You may exercise your right to opt out of the sale of personal information by using this toggle switch.
                If you opt out we will not be able to offer you personalised ads and will not hand over your personal information to any third parties. Additionally, you may contact our legal department for further clarification about your rights as a California consumer by using this Exercise My Rights link. If you have enabled privacy controls on your browser (such as a plugin), we have to take that as a valid request to opt-out. Therefore we would not be able to track your activity through the web. This may affect our ability to personalize ads according to your preferences.
Targeting Cookies
Switch Label
label
These cookies allow us to deliver content, including ads relevant to your interests, on our website/services or on third-party sites.
Analytics Cookies
Analytics Cookies
Analytics cookies collect information about your use of the Site and enable us to improve the way it works. For example, analytics cookies show us which are the most frequently visited pages on the Site, help us record any difficulties you have with the Site, and show us whether our advertising is effective or not. This allows us to see the overall patterns of usage on the Site, rather than the usage of a single person. We use the information to analyze Site traffic, but we do not examine this information for individually identifying information.
Performance Cookies
Performance Cookies
These cookies help us assess the performance of our website and services, including as part of our analytics practices to help us understand how individuals use the website/services.
Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
These cookies allow us to offer you enhanced functionality when using the website and services. The cookies collect information about your choices and preferences and allow us to remember language or other local settings and customize the Site accordingly.

About Navan
Navan is the global AI-powered
business travel
and
expense management platform
that makes travel easy for frequent travelers. powering travel programs at more than 10,000 companies, including
Canva
,
HelloFresh
, DoorDash,
Duolingo
, and Steelcase. The platform simplifies travel, payments, and expense management with intuitive tools for booking, automated payments with built-in virtual cards, and seamless expense reporting. Navan delivers
exceptional customer satisfaction
, with a 96% CSAT and 43 NPS. Founded in 2015 by Ariel Cohen and Ilan Twig as TripActions, Navan reported $613M in LTM revenue and $7.6B in LTM gross booking volume, each for the twelve months ended July 31, 2025. The company aims to empower organizations worldwide to make corporate travel smarter and more efficient. Learn more at
navan.com
.

analysis.name: Navan
analysis.value_proposition: AI-powered business travel and expense management platform that makes travel easy for frequent travelers while giving companies control and savings.
analysis.ideal_customer: Companies (SMB up to 300 employees free; enterprise via sales) managing corporate travel, expenses, and payments for frequent business travelers

features.name: corporate travel booking
features.description: Book flights, hotels, car rentals, and trains in one platform
features.evidence_quote: travelers can book flights, hotels, car rentals, and trains on Navan

features.name: global travel inventory
features.description: Access to global travel inventory with exclusive negotiated rates
features.evidence_quote: Global travel inventory and exclusive rates

features.name: policy and approval workflows
features.description: Unlimited configurable travel/spend policies and approval workflows

features.name: self-serve trip changes
features.description: Travelers can modify bookings themselves without agent help
features.evidence_quote: Self-serve changes and 24/7 travel support agents

features.name: 24/7 travel support
features.description: Around-the-clock human travel support agents
features.evidence_quote: Self-serve changes and 24/7 travel support agents

features.name: navan rewards

features.name: reimbursements

features.evidence_quote: Connect existing corporate or business credit cards

features.name: receipt scanning

features.evidence_quote: Navan corporate cards, Navan Connect... reimbursements

features.evidence_quote: How do Navan virtual cards work for pay-at-hotel bookings?

features.description: AI automatically categorizes and reconciles expenses
features.evidence_quote: AI automatically categorizes and reconciles expenses

features.name: real-time expense visibility
features.description: Full real-time visibility into every expense
features.evidence_quote: Get full visibility into every expense in real-time

features.name: out-of-policy flagging
features.description: Automatically flags out-of-policy transactions

features.name: navan edge
features.description: AI travel assistant for frequent travelers handling flights, hotels, restaurants
features.evidence_quote: Navan Edge is your AI travel assistant handling flights, hotels, and restaurants

features.evidence_quote: Navan Events — Source venues and manage events end-to-end

features.evidence_quote: Get Navan Rewards for personal trips

features.description: Track and report on travel emissions / sustainability

features.description: Know where travelers are for safety and duty of care
features.evidence_quote: Enhance your duty of care by knowing where your travelers are

features.name: spend guardrails
features.description: Set spend limits and guardrails to keep bookings within policy
features.evidence_quote: Set spend guardrails so everyone stays within policy

features.name: guest booking
features.description: Invite employees & guests to book their own travel
features.evidence_quote: Invite employees & guests to book their own travel

features.description: Automate calendar syncing of travel itineraries
features.evidence_quote: Automate itinerary emails, calendar syncing, and loyalty accumulation

differentiators: Free platform for companies up to 300 employees (commission-funded model)
Unified travel + expense + payments in one platform
AI-powered booking and expense automation (Navan Edge, AI categorization)
Navan Rewards — traveler incentives for staying in policy
96% CSAT and 43 NPS
Powers travel at 10,000+ companies including Canva, HelloFresh, DoorDash, Duolingo, Steelcase
Study shows customers save 16% on business travel
Navan Connect: bring your own corporate card (Visa/MC/Amex compatible)

recent_ships.what: Navan Edge — AI travel assistant for frequent travelers, early access
recent_ships.source: Introducing Navan Edge — The new standard for frequent travelers: tailored, rewarding, effortless

praised: "Navan just feels so much easier. It's super seamless."
"Booking through Navan makes our lives easier while saving the company money" — Amanda Kim, Commercial accountant
4.7/5 across 9K+ reviews
96% CSAT, 43 NPS (self-reported)
complaints: HN: "Navan founders cashing out, while company losing 100M" — investor/financial-health skepticism
HN: "Navan IPO tumbles 20% after historic debut under SEC shutdown workaround" — rocky public-market debut
HN thread on recreating receipt scan feature suggests some devs view it as replicable rather than deeply differentiated
sources: g2 (rating aggregate only — G2 page blocked)

free_tier.limits: Free for companies up to 300 employees; expense free for first 5 monthly expensing users, then $15/user/month

tiers.name: Navan Business
tiers.headline_inclusions: Free for ≤300 employees: global inventory, unlimited policies, 24/7 support, Rewards, 30+ HRIS, expense free for 5 users

tiers.name: Navan Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: Everything in Business + full Travel & Expense suite, unlimited users, global coverage, dedicated AE & CSM, custom implementation

pricing.notes: Travel is free (commission-funded via travel providers). Expense is free for first 5 monthly expensing users, then $15/user/month. Above 300 employees requires demo/Enterprise. An expensing user = anyone submitting a transaction (manual or via Navan Connect).

Prevent duplicate or incorrect payments
Simplify reporting and audits with real-time visibility into cash flow
Unify travel, expense, and AP into one holistic view

Integrations
Our tools work with your tools, right from the start
Choose from 300+ pre-built connectors and custom integrations that allow our solutions to work with your existing systems. If you need a custom integration—no problem—our open APIs make that possible for developers.
Learn more about integrations
Watch a short demo from our solution experts

Industry leaders in AI-powered T&E tools
Not only are we #1 on G2, but we are also the only T&E company to be named an AI leader across enterprise, midmarket, small business, and travel-booking applications.
IDC MarketScape T&E Software 2025
Trusted by users from companies of all sizes
< 500 Employees
“The automation not only saves time for employees and finance teams but also provides a clear overview of expenses, making reporting and follow-up significantly more efficient.”
Read the full review
500+ Employees
“This is a powerful tool for automating expense, travel, and invoice management. Its ability to integrate with other systems, such as ERPs, leads to significant time savings.”
Read the full review
10,000+ Employees
“What I like best about SAP Concur is how it simplifies and streamlines expense and travel management. It saves time, reduces errors, and provides clear visibility into spending, making processes more efficient for both employees and finance teams.”
Read the full review
FAQs about SAP Concur
What is SAP Concur?
SAP Concur is a cloud-based platform that helps you manage expense, travel, and invoice processes in one place. Our solutions automate how employees submit expenses, book travel, and handle invoices, while giving companies better visibility and control over their spending.
More about Concur
Is SAP Concur suitable for different business sizes?
Yes. SAP Concur solutions are designed for businesses of all sizes. Our flexible, centralized platform is built to grow with you, allowing you to scale your spend management along with your business.
Learn about scalability
How does SAP Concur help control spend?
SAP Concur helps control spend by giving you real-time visibility into where your money’s going and adding guardrails along the way. It automates processes, enforces policies, and flags unusual or out-of-policy expenses so you can make smarter spending decisions.
Learn about cost control
Does SAP Concur integrate with other solutions?
Yes. SAP Concur integrates with your existing HR, payroll, finance, CRM and more so you can manage everything in one place. We make it easy by offering pre-built connectors and integrations, or you can customize integrations for your specific business needs.
Learn about integrations
Does SAP Concur use AI?
Yes. SAP Concur has had AI and machine learning embedded in our solutions for over a decade. It works behind the scenes to automate tasks, capture receipt data, flag unusual or out-of-policy expenses, and spot potential fraud by analyzing spending patterns.
Learn about Concur and AI
There’s never been a better time for the best spend management

Popular User Connections
Do more with your favorite apps and services by linking them to your SAP Concur account
Lufthansa German Airlines
A new level for your Travel & Expense management
Connect your Lufthansa Miles & More account with Concur to optimize your travel expenses automatically – it’s easy when you book all your business trips & extra services at LH.com.
American Airlines
Connect your AAdvantage Account with Concur
With SAP Concur + American, access your company’s negotiated rates on AA.com and sync AA.com bookings with Concur Travel and Expense.
SAP Concur mobile app
One app for travel, receipts, reports
Easily manage your travel and expenses with SAP Concur direct from your smartphone.
TripIt
An easier trip, every time
Connect to TripIt, the world’s highest-rated travel-organizing app, to access every trip in one place. Plus, TripIt Pro helps you stay one step ahead, from planning to landing.
Delta Air Lines
Make your business travel quick and easy with Delta.
Connect your Delta SkyMiles® account to access your company’s negotiated travel rates, view upcoming trips and sync your expenses all in one convenient place.
United Airlines
United makes corporate travel easier
Connect your United MileagePlus® profile to Concur and your United reservation details will automatically sync to your Concur account.
Hertz
Faster Connections, Better Reservations
Skip the counter and get on the road faster. Connect your Hertz profile with Concur, and your Hertz.com reservations will automatically sync.
Hyatt Hotels Corporation
Sync reservation details with Concur for business travel.
Make your travel more rewarding. Connect your World of Hyatt account with Concur and have access to everything in one place.
Uber
Tap. Ride. Expense.
Traveling for business has never been easier. Connect your Uber account to SAP Concur and your business trip receipts will automatically be sent to Concur Expense.
SIXT
Enjoy a great digital Sixtperience with SAP Concur & Sixt!
Connect your Sixt corporate booking profile with your SAP Concur profile and let your Sixt App and Sixt Web reservation and invoice data automatically sync into SAP Concur.
Skip to User Connections
Enterprise Applications
Pre-built business solutions integrated with your company's SAP Concur products
This is an SAP Concur endorsed app that has achieved premium certification.
Endorsed App
Motus Reimbursement
The complete solution for employee driving
Motus is the complete solution for employee driving. Integrated with Concur Expense, Motus optimizes field productivity & vehicle spend while reducing corporate liability exposure.
This is an SAP Concur endorsed app that has achieved premium certification.
Endorsed App
MedPro Connect Expense & Invoice
Access the 26 million MedProID HCP database via Concur Expense & Concur Invoice
MedPro Systems’ connector allows real-time access to the MedProID database via Concur Expense & Concur Invoice to simplify accurate HCP data capture for Aggregate Spend reporting.
This is an SAP Concur endorsed app that has achieved premium certification.
Endorsed App
International SOS
Worldwide Reach. Human Touch.
Streamline your organization’s travel, compliance, and Duty of Care with International SOS and Concur Travel.
This is an SAP Concur endorsed app that has achieved premium certification.
Endorsed App
Blue dot Tax Assurance
VAT Recovery made easy
Blue dot Tax Assurance handles domestic and foreign travel expenses, foreign VAT in AP,and centrally billed TMC and procurement card expenses, within a single platform.
This is an SAP Concur endorsed app that has achieved premium certification.
Endorsed App
Blue dot Benefits Assurance
Automatically detect fringe benefits in employee expenses
The Blue dot Benefits solution continuously analyses employee expense reports and receipt images to automatically identify items that must be reported as fringe or taxable benefits
Uber for Business
Now Part of the Perfect Trip
Uber for Business gives your organization more control and deeper insights while enabling employees to take rides on business profiles and expense seamlessly.
Amazon Business Integration
Simplify expensing Amazon Business purchases.
Connect your Amazon Business account to Concur Expense and your business purchases will be automatically imported into your expense reports, making it easy to get reimbursed.
Zylo Concur Expense Integration
Find your SaaS spend and bring Shadow IT out of the dark
How many SaaS apps do you think you have? Now multiply that by 3. The average company has more than 300 apps, but most leaders underestimate their SaaS by 2-3X.
EY Mobility Pathway – Travel
Fast guidance on tax and immigration issues arising from business travel
When employees travel, they can expose themselves and their company to risks involving corporate tax, immigration, social security, regulatory compliance and more.
Lyft Business
Give your travelers easy, reliable rides
With Lyft Business, you can provide reliable transportation that helps your business travelers focus on doing their best work — not searching for receipts.
Deloitte – Travel Ready
Pre-travel risk assessment to enable employees to work compliantly and with confidence
Connecting Deloitte with Concur Travel and Concur Request for real time assessment of travel and remote work compliance risk. Seamless user experience, empowering your business.
Tripkicks for Concur Travel
Making business travel better
Provides actionable insights for trips, guidance on appropriate spend and behavior, and enhances traveler experience.
Deloitte Travel Compliance
An employer compliance management tool for tax, payroll & other obligations
Maximizing the value of your Concur Travel & Expense data, connecting to Deloitte’s compliance platform to manage your businesses compliance and reporting needs.
Topia
Leverage SAP Concur Data for Business Travel and Distributed Work Compliance with Topia
Use Topia Compass to reduce travel booking costs, mitigate compliance risk and perform real-time pre-travel assessments.
AxosMoney
CFDI Compliance for Concur Expense
Complying with Mexican government CFDI regulations has never been easier. Simply use your mobile device to effortlessly validate your e-receipts integrated with Concur Expense.
Wipfli ExpenseConnect
Fully integrated with Microsoft D365 Business Central, F&O, SL, Oracle NetSuite & Sage Intacct.
Automated cloud-based connector with flexible data mapping between systems. Fully integrated with the supported ERP’s. No more manual manipulation of data files required!
Thrust Carbon for Concur Travel
Deep Decarbonization and Carbon Compliance for Business Travel
Operate more sustainability with award winning carbon intelligence software. Effortlessly report, reduce, and remove carbon, with directly connected data.
GATE4 Insights by Advito
Track and reduce your travel program’s carbon emissions with accurate sustainability reporting
Integrate your SAP Concur data into GATE4 Insights by Advito to get accurate travel emissions reporting with the industry’s only ISO-certified calculation methodology.
Thrust Carbon for Concur Expense
Deep Decarbonization and Carbon Compliance for Business Travel
Operate more sustainability with award winning carbon intelligence software. Effortlessly report, reduce, and remove carbon, with directly connected data.
SAP E-Mobility
Drive the transition to sustainable and convenient electric mobility.
Simplify reimbursement of employee electricity costs from charging company cars at home
PivotPrime Expense
Report on expenses allocated to clients, projects, and intercompany.
Creates statements of expenses allocated to clients, projects, and intercompany – pulling all approved expenses from Concur along with receipt images – to include in a statement.
PivotPrime Invoice
Creates statements of purchases allocated to clients, projects, and intercompany.
Statements of purchases allocated to clients, projects, and intercompany – pulling all approved transactions from Concur with payment request images – to include in statements.
Concur Detect by Oversight
Enhance your expense audit program while mitigating and reducing risk
Concur Detect by Oversight analyzes expenses pre- and post-payment to identify errors, waste, patterns of misuse, and fraud.
Booking.com for Business
The biggest online accommodation marketplace in the world
With close to 2 million accommodation options in 220+ countries, Booking.com for Business offers more bookable properties than any other marketplace through Concur Travel
Total Trip Insights by Advito
See your full travel picture with automated expense data consolidation.
Optimize your travel program with Total Trip Insights by Advito. Combine Concur Expense data with agency, supplier, and other sources to elevate your strategy and drive results.
Axosnet Digital Invoice Verifier
Web-based CFDI Compliance for Concur Expense and Concur Invoice
Validate e-invoices (CFDI) without hassle within Concur Expense and Concur Invoice, verifying structure, signature and certificates to comply with Mexican government regulations.
Expense Connector for Sage
Automatically post expenses into Sage
Seamless integration between Concur Expense and Sage50 (UK), Sage200 (UK), Sage300 & SageX3
OmniFY Expense Dynamics NAV&BC
Clean integration between Concur Expense and Microsoft Dynamics Navision and Business Central
Built on Dynamics NAV technology, the middleware-free connector can be configured and managed by your staff to meet your business requirements without costly custom development.
This is an SAP Concur endorsed app that has achieved premium certification.
Endorsed App
MedPro Export Aggregate Spend
Automate data export from SAP Concur to any Aggregate Spend Solution
Simplify end-to-end transparency data management with MedPro’s automated export connector for SAP Concur to our leading Aggregate Spend Application, MedPro ComplianceReportingID
This is an SAP Concur endorsed app that has achieved premium certification.
Endorsed App
MedPro Connect International
The Life Sciences industry’s HCP app for Aggregate Spend with international data
The Life Sciences industry’s HCP app for Aggregate Spend with international data.
Veeva Network Connector
Access HCP data from Concur Expense
Improve compliance and accuracy with access to Veeva Network’s global database of complete, up-to-date Health Care Provider records.
Productiv for Concur Invoice
Track SaaS spend through supplier payments in the Productiv SaaS Intelligence™ platform
Track SaaS app spend by supplier and identify spend optimization opportunities in the Productiv SaaS Intelligence™ platform with the Productiv Connector for Concur Invoice.
Veeva Connector
Accurate streamlined reporting
Enable users to capture expenses in Veeva and post them to Concur Expense automatically, eliminating duplicate work and improving spend accuracy.
Wipfli InvoiceConnect
Fully integrated  with Microsoft D365 Business Central, F&O, SL, Oracle NetSuite & Sage Intacct.
Automated cloud-based connector with flexible data mapping between systems. Fully integrated with the supported ERP’s. No more manual manipulation of data files required!
IQVIA Global OneKey Connector
Real-time access to a database of global healthcare professionals within SAP Concur
Enable your global organization to select the right physician, nurse, or administrator profile in real time to satisfy global transparency regulations.
Groupize
The easiest way to manage groups, meetings, and events.
Groupize integrates with Concur Travel to revolutionize travel, meetings, and events for your entire organization.
Cvent Concur Expense Connector
Integrating Travel, Meetings & Expense
Cvent and Concur Expense automate the attendee process and backend reconciliation of meetings, travel and expense data.
Healix Sentinel Tracker
Quickly locate and communicate with your global workforce to ensure their safety.
Healix Sentinel Tracker, integrated with Concur Travel, provides a real-time global view of employees on an interactive map and facilitates 2-way communication to ensure their safety.
Terra Dotta AlertTraveler
Locate & notify global travelers with real-time event intelligence and two-way in-app communication
AlertTraveler provides a command center for locating, communicating with, and accounting for travelers, automatically updating itinerary info from Concur Travel and/or TripLink.
OnSolve
Identify risks and communicate in real-time, all from one easy-to-use platform
OnSolve helps organizations remain agile when a crisis strikes using AI-powered technology to pinpoint and respond to threats that impact people, places, and property.
battleface Travel Protection
battleface offers travel protection for business and bleisure trips or corporate group travel.
battleface offers travel protection plans for individuals traveling for business, bleisure, and corporate groups attending meetings, tradeshows, or conferences.
Time Tracker by eBillity
Finally track time and expenses together!
Connect SAP Concur with Time Tracker and your team can easily track time and expenses together for fast and accurate billing.
CIBTvisas
Fast and easy global travel visa services
CIBTvisas’ service helps to simplify complex foreign entry requirements, increase traveler compliance, and fulfill duty of care obligations in accordance with international travel.

differentiators: #1 on G2 for T&E
Only T&E company named AI leader across enterprise, midmarket, small business, and travel-booking (IDC MarketScape T&E Software 2025)
300+ pre-built connectors plus open APIs
Unified travel + expense + invoice on a single platform
Agentic AI travel assistant trained on customer policies
Backed by SAP with deep ERP integration

recent_ships.what: Named AI leader in IDC MarketScape T&E Software 2025
Agentic AI travel assistant trained on customer policies
recent_ships.source: Concur Travel: Agentic AI assistant trained on your policies

praised: The automation not only saves time for employees and finance teams but also provides a clear overview of expenses
powerful tool for automating expense, travel, and invoice management. Its ability to integrate with other systems, such as ERPs, leads to significant time savings
simplifies and streamlines expense and travel management. It saves time, reduces errors, and provides clear visibility into spending
complaints: Repeatedly featured as 'Software horror show: SAP Concur' on Hacker News (356 upvotes, 190 comments and another 198/181 thread) — widely criticized UX and clunky workflows
Hipmunk co-founders 'spurned' by SAP Concur when attempting to buy back the company — signals acquired-and-neglected product criticism

pricing.notes: Pricing page returns 404; SAP Concur uses contact-sales/request-a-quote model. Multiple service tiers exist (Concur Essential Care, Select Care, Advanced Care) but prices are not published.

analysis.name: Coupa
analysis.value_proposition: A unified AI-native platform for total spend management covering source-to-contract, procure-to-order, invoice-to-pay, and direct spend across enterprise supply chains.
analysis.ideal_customer: Large enterprises and mid-market companies managing complex procurement, supply chain, AP, and finance operations across global teams

features.name: category strategy
features.description: Scale procurement planning across teams with structured category management
features.evidence_quote: Category Strategy – Scale planning across teams

features.name: sourcing
features.description: Strategic sourcing tools to accelerate and de-risk supplier selection decisions

features.name: sourcing optimization
features.description: Advanced optimization engine to maximize sourcing efficiency across complex bid scenarios

features.name: contract lifecycle management
features.description: End-to-end contract authoring, negotiation, execution, and compliance tracking
features.evidence_quote: Contract Lifecycle Management – Take control end-to-end

features.name: supplier information & risk management
features.description: Centralized supplier onboarding, data management, and risk monitoring across the supply base
features.evidence_quote: Supplier Information & Risk Management – Manage risk across suppliers

features.name: intake & orchestration
features.description: Agentic request intake layer that routes and orchestrates procurement workflows from initial request to action
features.evidence_quote: Intake & Orchestration – Turn requests into action

features.name: agentic intake & orchestration
features.description: AI-driven intake and orchestration capabilities acquired via Tonkean, enabling no-code workflow automation
features.evidence_quote: Coupa Acquires Tonkean – Agentic Intake & Orchestration

features.name: procurement
features.description: Guided buying experience with policy compliance, catalog management, and purchase order automation

features.name: services procurement
features.description: Visibility and control over contingent workforce and services spend
features.evidence_quote: Services Procurement – Gain visibility and control

features.name: inventory management
features.description: Stock tracking and management to maintain optimal inventory levels
features.evidence_quote: Inventory Management – Manage stock with precision

features.name: spend analysis
features.description: AI-powered spend analytics providing actionable insights across categories, suppliers, and business units
features.evidence_quote: Spend Analysis – Get insights you can act on

features.name: ap automation
features.description: Accounts payable automation covering invoice capture, matching, approval, and payment processing
features.evidence_quote: AP Automation – Optimize processes with full visibility

features.name: expense management
features.description: Automated employee expense capture, policy enforcement, and reimbursement workflows

features.name: payments
features.description: Secure, streamlined B2B payment execution and tracking

features.name: treasury management
features.description: Liquidity optimization and cash management tools for finance teams

features.name: fraud protection
features.description: Real-time fraud detection and prevention across payment and procurement workflows

features.name: direct spend solutions
features.description: End-to-end management of direct material spend to drive cost and outcome control
features.evidence_quote: Direct Spend Solutions – Control spend to drive outcomes

features.name: supply chain design & planning
features.description: Agentic AI-powered supply chain network design and demand/disruption planning
features.evidence_quote: Supply Chain Design & Planning – Plan for demand and disruption

features.name: supply chain collaboration
features.description: Cross-team and cross-supplier alignment tools for supply chain execution
features.evidence_quote: Supply Chain Collaboration – Improve alignment across teams

features.name: coupa ai
features.description: Native AI layer powering analytics, recommendations, and agents across the full platform
features.evidence_quote: Coupa AI Overview – Real AI for real business outcomes

features.name: analytics agent
features.description: AI agent that answers analytical questions using conversational natural-language querying
features.evidence_quote: Analytics Agent – Learn how to find answers to your analytical questions

features.name: knowledge agent
features.description: AI agent providing answers to procurement-related questions from internal knowledge
features.evidence_quote: Knowledge Agent – find answers to your procurement-related questions

features.name: supplier assistance agent
features.description: Coupa Navi AI agent helping suppliers navigate the Coupa Supplier Portal via natural language
features.evidence_quote: Coupa Navi™ CSP Supplier Assistance Agent assists suppliers with general questions about the CSP

features.name: coupa compose
features.description: Unified AI intelligence layer consolidating AI capabilities across the Coupa platform
features.evidence_quote: Coupa Compose – Intelligence on one platform

features.name: ai use case library
features.description: Curated library of validated AI use cases showing measurable business results
features.evidence_quote: AI Use Case Library – See how AI drives results

features.name: coupa supplier portal (csp)
features.description: Self-service portal for suppliers to manage profiles, invoices, and communications

features.name: app marketplace
features.description: Third-party app ecosystem for extending Coupa with partner-built integrations and solutions

features.name: coupa university
features.description: Customer training and certification platform for Coupa product education

features.name: community forum
features.description: Peer community for Coupa users to share best practices and get help

features.name: value services
features.description: Professional services offering focused on quantifying and realizing ROI from Coupa

features.name: multi-language support

This website uses cookies to enhance user experience and to analyze performance and traffic on our website. Additional information about data collection is available in our
privacy policy.
Manage Consent Preferences
Accept All Cookies
Privacy Preference Center
When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences, or your device, and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect. The information does not usually identify you directly, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to learn more and change our default settings. Blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer.
More information
Allow All
Manage Consent Preferences
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.
Performance Cookies
Performance Cookies
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site. All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.
Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites. They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.
Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.

We use various tracking technologies to improve your experience, analyze our traffic and personalize ads.  Information about your site visit may be stored or shared with third parties. For more information, see our
Privacy Notice
. By continuing to use the site, you consent to our
Website Terms of Use.
You can opt-out of certain types of cookies by clicking on the “Manage Cookies” button below.
Manage Cookies
Privacy Preference Center
Opt-Out Request Honored
Privacy Preference Center
Your Privacy
Required
Marketing Cookies
Your Privacy
Websites use cookies and similar tracking technologies to store information about your device, browser and preferences for functionality and personalization to improve your experience with the website without identifying you. While some cookies are required, you may opt out of marketing cookies through the category headings. Note that if your browser clears cookies on exit, your opt-out preferences will be deleted, requiring re-selection during your next visit.
More information
User ID:
bbecd68c-634f-4f30-be55-5809c1c12057
This User ID will be used as a unique identifier while storing and accessing your preferences for future.
Required
Always Active
Cookies that are required by BILL, and can't be skipped
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.
Performance Cookies
Always Active
Performance and analytics cookies collect information that is used in aggregate form to help us understand how our website is being used and to find out more about the type of traffic our website receives. This helps us to improve your and others’ experience of the website.
Functional Cookies
Always Active
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation, such as remembering your language and currency preferences. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
Marketing Cookies
Marketing Cookies
We use third parties to assist us with our marketing and advertising activities. Marketing Cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. You can choose to opt out of these cookies, in which case you may still see our advertisements, but they will not be tailored to your interests.
Marketing Cookies
Switch Label
label
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and serve you with advertisements we believe are relevant to you and your interests on other sites you visit.  Another benefit of these cookies is that the information collected can be used to limit the number of times you see an advertisement to avoid over-exposure.They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. Please note that if you disable these, you will still see ads; they just won't be tailored to your interests.
Social Media Cookies
Switch Label
label
These cookies are set by a range of social media services that we have added to the site to enable you to share our content with your friends and networks. They are capable of tracking your browser across other sites and building up a profile of your interests. This may impact the content and messages you see on other websites you visit. If you do not allow these cookies you may not be able to use or see these sharing tools.
