analysis.name: Divvy (BILL Spend & Expense)
analysis.tagline: Expense management software that powers smart company cards
analysis.value_proposition: AI-powered expense management paired with smart corporate cards so every transaction is controlled, categorized, and automatically compliant.
analysis.ideal_customer: Small and midsize businesses (and accounting firms serving them) that want unified corporate cards, budgets, and expense management

features.name: corporate cards
features.description: Smart physical company cards (BILL Divvy Card) issued via bank partners
features.evidence_quote: smart, flexible cards paired with AI-powered expense management software

features.name: virtual cards
features.description: On-demand virtual cards for controlled spend

features.name: business credit
features.description: Business credit line tied to the BILL Divvy Card

features.name: expense management
features.description: AI-powered categorization and automatic compliance on transactions
features.evidence_quote: every transaction is controlled, categorized, and automatically compliant

features.name: budgets
features.description: Budget creation and enforcement across teams

features.name: budget management
features.description: Set and manage budgets with real-time controls

features.name: reimbursements
features.description: Employee out-of-pocket expense reimbursements

features.name: mobile app
features.description: iOS/Android app for cards, expenses, and approvals on the go

features.name: reporting and insights
features.description: Spend reporting and analytics dashboards

features.name: rewards
features.description: Card rewards program on business spend

features.name: travel management
features.description: Manage business travel booking and spend

features.name: international payments
features.description: Cross-border payments capability

features.name: payments services
features.description: Card-linked payment services layer

features.name: ai categorization
features.description: AI automatically categorizes transactions for compliance
features.evidence_quote: AI-powered expense management software—so every transaction is controlled, categorized

features.name: api
features.description: Developer API for integrating spend/expense data

features.name: approvals
features.description: Configurable approval workflows for expenses

features.name: accounting sync
features.description: Two-way sync with major accounting systems

features.name: quickbooks integration
features.description: Integration with QuickBooks Online/Desktop

features.name: sage intacct integration
features.description: Integration with Sage Intacct

features.name: netsuite integration
features.description: Integration with Oracle NetSuite

features.name: xero integration
features.description: Integration with Xero

features.name: slack integration
features.description: Slack notifications and approvals

features.name: hris integration
features.description: Sync with HRIS systems for employee data

features.name: accountant console
features.description: Multi-client console for accounting firms

features.name: inbox / document management
features.description: Centralized inbox for receipts and expense docs

features.name: multi-entity support
features.description: Manage spend across multiple entities/locations
features.evidence_quote: Automate for multiple entities or locations

features.name: security controls
features.description: Platform-level security features

features.name: imports and exports
features.description: Bulk import/export of expense and card data

features.name: user profile management
features.description: Role/user profile administration

differentiators: Corporate cards bundled with expense management (no separate card + software)
AI-powered automatic categorization and compliance on every transaction
Business credit line tied directly to the card product
Free to use — no software subscription fee (monetized via interchange)

free_tier.limits: Free software; requires approval for BILL Divvy Card and business credit line

tiers.name: BILL Spend & Expense
tiers.headline_inclusions: Cards, budgets, expense management, reimbursements, rewards, integrations

pricing.notes: Pricing page (bill.com/pricing/spend-and-expense) returns 404; Spend & Expense is historically offered free (revenue from interchange on the BILL Divvy Card). Card issuance is subject to credit approval via Divvy Pay, LLC's bank partners.

Loved by 5,000+ Finance Teams
4.7/5
Spend management your business will love. Yes, really.
Ways to use Spendesk
Tired of chasing receipts? Ready to make employees and budget owners accountable? From business travel and subscription management to petty cash and beyond, tracking expenses has never been simpler.
Save time and reduce costs across your company
Set rules and policies that are smoothly adopted. Automate every step of the spend process. Uncover errors and see where you are overspending in real time. Businesses save up to 90% on their invoice processing costs.
Why finance teams choose Spendesk
Spendesk removes the biggest obstacles that make the work of finance teams tedious and frustrating. No more chasing employees for receipts, implementing processes that no one follows, or dealing with lost contracts and missed renewals.
See our solutions
The spend management platform that
connects the moving parts of your business
Real-time control on spend, secure payment methods, clever automations, and more — making accounting a breeze.

Accounts Payable
Streamline your invoice management: pay suppliers globally, securely, on time and in the right currency.
“We were looking to implement a tool that would be easily adopted by all stakeholders beyond Finance and Purchasing.”
Aurore Teboul
Procurement Manager, PayFit
Business
Advanced workflows & policies
Add dynamic approver roles and multi-condition workflows to simplify even the most complex approval processes with seamless, automated consistency.
Powerful multi-entity management
Manage multiple legal entities with centralised visibility, tailored control and flexible configurations, all in one place.
HR & ERP Integrations
Easily connect Spendesk to your business-critical tools, including 40+ HRIS tools, ERP and travel systems, or choose our native API to automate everything in between.
AI-based automation and fraud detection
Finance-focused AI that uncovers insights, streamlines bookkeeping and safeguards against errors.
Your plan
See details
Included
Foundations
CFO Connect Pro
2
Included
Request a free quote
Our customers get results
4x
faster month end
98%
of receipts collected automatically
100%
visibility and control
Loved by 5,000+ Finance Teams
4.7/5
Want to know more?
It can be hard to choose new tools for your business. We’re here to help you make the right decision.
Get more answers
How are prices calculated?
Our packages are made up of two components:
1. Fixed fee for platform access
To simplify and streamline recurring costs, we have a fixed monthly subscription fee to get access to all payment methods and the platform plan of your choice. You also get unlimited users.
2. Variable fees for transaction usage
To ensure you only pay for what you use, we have variable pricing based on the number of transactions your team makes on Spendesk. Transactions include card purchases, invoice payments and expense claims.
Want to know more about pricing?
Contact our sales.
How much does a physical card cost?
Card orders are free of charge and there are no monthly card fees. You can order as many cards as you need for your employees.
What's the price of an active user?
We do not charge active user fees. With our paid plans, add as many spenders as you want for ongoing or even just one-off spending.
Start with the essentials. Scale as you grow.
Spendesk gives you flexibility, control, and the tools to make smarter spend decisions — at every stage.
Build your plan

analysis.name: Spendesk
analysis.value_proposition: All-in-one procurement and spend management platform giving finance teams complete visibility and control over company spending with corporate cards, accounts payable, and automated expense management.
analysis.ideal_customer: Finance teams (CFOs, finance managers) at European SMB and mid-market companies needing to centralize and automate spend, cards, invoices, and procurement across departments or legal entities.

features.name: physical corporate cards
features.description: Issue unlimited physical cards to employees with configurable spending limits and controls
features.evidence_quote: Issue unlimited physical cards to empower teams and stay in control

features.name: virtual cards (single-use)
features.description: Generate unique single-use virtual cards for secure one-off online payments
features.evidence_quote: Use single-use cards for secure, one-off payments

features.name: virtual cards (recurring)
features.description: Recurring virtual cards for ongoing subscription payments
features.evidence_quote: Manage subscriptions with recurring virtual cards

features.name: multi-use virtual cards
features.description: Project or event scoped virtual cards for tracking spend against a specific purpose
features.evidence_quote: Track project or event spend with multi-use cards

features.name: expense claims
features.description: Employee expense submission, tracking, and reimbursement in one place
features.evidence_quote: Manage and reimburse expenses without chasing for receipts

features.name: mileage tracking
features.description: Submit and manage mileage-based expense claims
features.evidence_quote: Expense Claims / Mileage / Per Diem — Submit and manage your claims.

features.name: per diem management
features.description: Per diem expense submissions and management
features.evidence_quote: Expense Claims / Mileage / Per Diem — Submit and manage your claims.

features.name: receipt ocr
features.description: Automatic extraction of receipt data using OCR to save manual entry time
features.evidence_quote: Extract receipt data automatically with OCR and save valuable time

features.name: receipt matching
features.description: Automatic matching of receipts to the corresponding spend transaction
features.evidence_quote: Match receipts instantly to the right spend

features.name: automated receipt reminders
features.description: Custom rules and automated reminders to ensure timely receipt collection
features.evidence_quote: Create custom rules to ensure receipt collection and set up automated reminders

features.name: accounts payable
features.description: End-to-end invoice management from entry to payment, including global supplier payments
features.evidence_quote: Automate invoice handling from entry to payment

features.name: supplier invoice management
features.description: Submit, manage, pay, and bookkeep supplier invoices
features.evidence_quote: Supplier Invoices — Manage, pay and bookkeep your invoices with our Submit my Invoice feature.

features.name: e-invoicing compliance
features.description: European e-invoicing compliance tooling across multiple countries
features.evidence_quote: E-invoicing — Everything you need to know to comply with e-invoicing requirements across Europe

features.name: procure-to-pay
features.description: Full procurement cycle from purchase request intake through approval to payment
features.evidence_quote: Control and automate spend from intake to payment

features.name: purchase requests
features.description: Structured intake flow for employees to submit spend requests before purchasing
features.evidence_quote: Manage team purchase requests directly from your Slack account.

features.name: approval workflows
features.description: Configurable approval flows for card spend, invoices, and purchase requests
features.evidence_quote: Set card limits and create approval flows with smart card controls

features.name: multi-condition approval workflows
features.description: Dynamic approver roles and multi-condition logic for complex approval processes
features.evidence_quote: Add dynamic approver roles and multi-condition workflows to simplify even the most complex approval processes

features.name: budget management
features.description: Departmental budget planning, monitoring, and enforcement with real-time tracking
features.evidence_quote: Plan departmental spending using our detailed budget features

features.name: cost centers
features.description: Organize spend by cost center for accounting and reporting purposes
features.evidence_quote: Budgets, Cost Centers and Expense Categories

features.name: expense categories
features.description: Custom expense categorization for bookkeeping and reporting
features.evidence_quote: Budgets, Cost Centers and Expense Categories

features.name: real-time budget monitoring
features.description: Live visibility into budget consumption across departments

features.name: multi-entity management
features.description: Manage multiple legal entities with centralized visibility and tailored per-entity controls
features.evidence_quote: Manage multiple legal entities with centralised visibility, tailored control and flexible configurations, all in one place.

features.name: accounting automation
features.description: Automated bookkeeping, reconciliation, and export to accounting software
features.evidence_quote: Real-time control on spend, secure payment methods, clever automations, and more — making accounting a breeze.

features.name: spend reports and insights
features.description: Reporting dashboards with accurate and timely spending data
features.evidence_quote: Spend Reports & Insights — Get accurate and timely spending reports.

features.name: international payments
features.description: Pay suppliers globally in the right currency
features.evidence_quote: pay suppliers globally, securely, on time and in the right currency.

features.evidence_quote: Set up SSO, SAML and connect Spendesk with your company Slack

features.evidence_quote: Set up SSO, SAML and connect Spendesk with your company Slack

features.evidence_quote: Apple Pay and Google Pay offer easy, secure, and private ways to pay — now available on both iOS and Android devices.

features.evidence_quote: Tired of chasing receipts? Ready to make employees and budget owners accountable? From business travel and subscription management

features.evidence_quote: Our team will help you set up custom exports for your favourite accounting software.

features.evidence_quote: LicenceOne — Level up your SaaS subscription management.

features.name: spend policy enforcement
features.description: Define and auto-enforce company-wide spend rules and policies
features.evidence_quote: Set rules and policies that are smoothly adopted. Automate every step of the spend process.

features.name: end-to-end encryption
features.description: End-to-end encryption of all financial and transaction data

features.name: multi-factor authentication
features.description: MFA support for account security

features.name: iso 27001 certification
features.description: ISO 27001:2022 certified information security management

features.name: pci-dss compliance
features.description: PCI-DSS compliant payment card handling

features.description: GDPR compliant data handling for European customers

features.name: psd2 compliance
features.description: PSD2 compliant payment processing under European open banking regulation

differentiators: No per-user fees — unlimited users on all paid plans
No monthly card fees — unlimited physical cards included
Modular add-on pricing allows companies to pay only for capabilities they use
Procure-to-pay coverage in a single platform (intake → approval → payment → bookkeeping)
CFO Connect community of 12,000+ finance leaders included free for customers
98% of customers say onboarding was easy
Businesses save up to 90% on invoice processing costs
99% receipts collected on time with automated reminders
4 days faster month-end close
ISO 27001:2022 certified with end-to-end encryption, PCI-DSS, and PSD2 compliance

tiers.name: Foundations
tiers.headline_inclusions: Unlimited cards/users, expense claims, OCR, SSO, Slack, Xero/QBO/DATEV, real-time budgets, multi-entity reporting

tiers.name: Foundations + Procure to Pay add-on
tiers.headline_inclusions: Foundations + procurement workflow and accounts payable with global supplier payments

tiers.name: Foundations + Business add-on
tiers.headline_inclusions: Foundations + advanced multi-condition approvals, multi-entity, 40+ HRIS/ERP integrations, AI automation & fraud detection

pricing.notes: Pricing has two components: (1) fixed monthly platform fee and (2) variable per-transaction fee covering card purchases, invoice payments, and expense claims. No per-user fees and no card fees. CFO Connect Pro (625€/yr standalone) is free for Spendesk customers (one seat per customer). All prices require a sales quote — no self-serve checkout visible. QuickBooks integration is US-only.

analysis.value_proposition: End-to-end travel and expense, payments, and AP automation platform with AI-powered compliance controls for mid-market and enterprise.

About P. LEO Group – Electrical Insulation & Magnetics Specialties
Since its foundation in Hong Kong in 1973, P. Leo Group is one of the most prestigious manufacturers of electrical insulation materials with focus on electrical and electronics industry.
P. Leo, Hoi Luen Electrical, Lee Yuen Electrical and Heatsolve have all become part of the P. Leo Group. This landmark integration represents a substantial milestone as your electrical insulation specialist and allows us to provide you with even broader range of innovation products and material designs.
Our group has a strong track record of expertise and innovation and was the pioneers to establish and design UL electrical insulation systems back in 1980s. Our market-leading brands include BC Tape® Electrical Insulation Tapes, Hoi Luen® Wires, Lee Yuen® Power Cords, Heatsolve Heating Wires and JT Tech® Medical cables. Our products are UL and VDE certified, comply with other relevant industry standards. We also provide UL certified insulation systems and solutions.
Currently, P. Leo Group has more than 500 employees, 35,000 square meter manufacturing facilitates and R&D teams in Mainland China, Hong Kong and Indonesia. We are an IATF 16949, ISO14001 and ISO9001 registered company to ensure the highest standards of quality.
As we celebrated our 50th anniversary in 2023, we remain steadfast and push the boundaries of what is possible through our innovation and our dedication, and to provide cutting-edge and customised electrical insulation designs and solutions to meet the needs of our customers.
Mission
Our mission is to become your trusted provider of electrical insulation designs and solutions. Consistent high quality, innovation, and dedication are the pillars of our commitment to earn your trust.
Vision
Our electrical insulation solutions
enhancing
performances
of your products. Our innovation
addressing
challenges not just today, but also for the future.
PRODUCTS
We specialize in manufacturing Triple Insulated Wire, Heating Wire, Power Cords, Litz Wire, and Insulation Tape, delivering high-quality, reliable solutions for diverse electrical and industrial applications.

Elantas Varnish is the product brand of Elantas GmbH, a German company and a global leader in professional electronic insulation materials manufacturing. Elantas Varnish focuses on producing and selling various electrical insulation varnishes and coatings for electrical insulation, protection, and encapsulation applications.
The products of Elantas Varnish are used in various industries, including electronics, electrical, automotive, aerospace, energy, medical, and industrial sectors. They are utilized for the protection of electronic components, cables, motors, transformers, and other electrical equipment, providing insulation performance, heat resistance, corrosion resistance, and protection.
View Website
Jovil Universal LLC is a professional manufacturer of transformers and coil winding machines. They specialize in designing, developing, and manufacturing various types of coil winding machines to meet the needs of different industries. Their product range includes automatic winding machines, manual winding machines, multi-axis winding machines, and special winding machines.
Jovil Universal LLC's coil winding machines feature advanced functionality and technology, enabling high-precision and high-efficiency coil winding operations. These machines are commonly used in the winding processes of electrical and electronic equipment such as transformers, inductors, motors, and generators.
View Website
Micrometals is an engineering focused organization driven to deliver the industry’s best powder core solutions and serve those markets with the broadest selection of standard materials, shapes and sizes. Micrometals also has unmatched capabilities to provide quick-turn modified products, custom geometries and customized materials to solve challenging application requirements.
Micrometals works closely with customer’s engineering and supply chain teams to help them succeed and provide them with powder cores of uncompromising quality, performance and reliability.
For more informative details about Micrometals products, please visit:

This website uses cookies to improve your experience while you navigate through the website. Out of these cookies, the cookies that are categorized as necessary are stored on your browser as they as essential for the working of basic functionalities of the website.
We also use third-party cookies that help us analyze and understand how you use this website, to store user preferences and provide them with content and advertisements that are relevant to you. spec.body:
# ZergStack

**Current rule, updated from Idan Slack feedback on 2026-05-14:** ZergStack / zstack is the infrastructure and runtime stack, not the umbrella brand for user-facing products.

Public brand name is **ZergStack** when referring to the infrastructure product or runtime layer. Lowercase `zstack` is reserved for URLs, filesystem paths, config, and internal shorthand. Older copy that uses "ZergStack" as the product-family umbrella should be treated as stale until rewritten.

Source of truth for managed apps: `~/zerg/zstack.yaml`. Internal control plane: `~/zerg/zstack/` (a mini Render/Railway that deploys to Fly.io and surfaces live status). The public framing is close to Render/Vercel style infrastructure: code push -> deploy, runtime, app hosting, service status, and shared primitives.

## Zerg Products

Default temporary umbrella language for user-facing products is **Zerg products**. Use this until Matt/Idan choose a final family term. Do not use "marketplace" as the default umbrella; it implies third-party contributors and payments before that model is decided.

Current user-facing products / product concepts:

- [[Projects/Zerg-Production/Zergboard/Zergboard|Zergboard]] — project / task management (Trello/Linear-style) · competitive: [[Competitive/pm-software/index|pm-software]]
- [[Projects/Zerg-Production/ZergCRM/ZergCRM|ZergCRM]] — internal-only, on roadmap, no early-access flow
- [[Projects/Zerg-Production/ZergChat/ZergChat|ZergChat]] — Slack-style team messaging · competitive: [[Competitive/internal-chat/index|internal-chat]]
- [[Projects/Zerg-Production/ZergCal/ZergCal|ZergCal]] — calendar service (humans, interop, agent-native) · competitive: [[Competitive/calendar/index|calendar]]
- [[Projects/Zerg-Production/ZergMeeting/ZergMeeting|ZergMeeting]] — meeting capture / notes / actioning · competitive: [[Competitive/video-meetings/index|video-meetings]]
- [[Projects/Zerg-Production/ZergMail/ZergMail|ZergMail]] — agent-friendly email server · competitive: [[Competitive/workspace-email/index|workspace-email]]
- [[Projects/Zerg-Production/Zergwallet/Zergwallet|Zergwallet]] — wallet for zergs to hold/spend USD/BTC/ETH · competitive: [[Competitive/finance-and-wallets/index|finance-and-wallets]]
- [[Projects/Zerg-Production/Zergaudience/zergaudience-audience-taxonomy|Zergaudience]] — inbound capture / contacts / segments layer

Integration narrative: ZergMeeting → Zergboard → ZergChat → ZergCal → ZergMail. Full mapping (data flow, technical foundations, shipped-vs-spec'd status) lives in [[Projects/Zerg-Production/Zstack/Integration|Integration Narrative]].

Cross-product competitive sweeps should now say "Zerg products" unless the claim is specifically about the ZergStack infra layer.

## Apps Managed by ZergStack

These may be deployed via `zstack.yaml`, but that does not automatically make them part of a public product-family brand:

- [[Projects/Zerg-Production/ZergBox/ZergBox|ZergBox]] — file/upload utility app
- [[Projects/Zerg-Production/ZMsg/ZMsg|ZMsg]] — provider-aware messaging gateway (SMS/MMS/WhatsApp via Telnyx, Twilio)

The engineering-platform layer (`Zerg`, `ZDE`, `ZTC`, `Zerg Cloud`, `zterm`) is separate scope from both public Zerg products and the ZergStack infra page. Current internal evidence and open reliability/onboarding findings live in [[Projects/Zerg-Production/Zstack/ZTC|ZTC]]; zterm product/backlog direction lives in [[Projects/Zerg-Production/Zterm/Zterm|Zterm]].

## Brand & Naming Conventions

- Public/long names: `Zergboard`, `ZergCRM`, `ZergChat`, `ZergCal`, `ZergMeeting`, `ZergMail`, `Zergwallet`, `Zergaudience`, `ZergStack`
- Short names reserved for internal/dev: `zboard`, `zchat`, `zcal`, `zmail`, `zcrm`
- One domain per product (registration tracked under WEB-30 on the Website Zergboard board)
- Product pages can say "runs on ZergStack" when discussing infra/runtime. They should not use "part of ZergStack" as the primary product positioning.
- Green-heavy product pages are not the default visual direction for Zergboard/Zergwallet. Per Idan 2026-05-14, use the more subdued Zergaudience-style dark treatment when using the green palette.

## Pricing

**Locked 2026-05-05** (vampire-attack on individual SaaS competitors):

| Tier | Price | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Free | $0 | Volume-capped per product |
| Basic | **$1/seat/mo** | Full feature surface; no agent governance |
| Pro | **$9/seat/mo** | + Scoped per-agent API tokens, tenant-safe routes, SSO, audit, advanced roles |
| Enterprise | Custom | + SLA, BYO-KMS, on-prem, SOC 2 / DPA |

Bundle SKUs remain proposed and should be renamed away from "Zstack" in public copy unless Matt/Idan explicitly choose that terminology. Working internal examples: **$4/seat Zerg products Basic** (20% off 5x Basic) and **$19/seat Zerg products Pro** (58% off 5x Pro). Strategy memory: `project_zstack_pricing.md`.

Per-product feature splits: [[Writing/Zstack Microproduct Pricing (WEB-31)]]. Category-leader benchmarks: [[Projects/Zerg-Production/Zstack/Pricing-Snapshot|Pricing Snapshot]] (now updated with locked decisions). Implementation rolled out for Zergboard + zmail in PR #283.

## Auth & Security

- Auth unification deferred until product-family bundle launch (WEB-10); provider pre-work under WEB-38
- Security page lives at zergai.com/security; MNDA-gated request flow (no public PDFs)
- SOC 2 Type II target placeholder Q3 2026 (WEB-37)
- DPA / sub-processor list / MNDA template under WEB-34, WEB-35, WEB-36

## Bootstrap Recipe (New Microproduct)

From [[Projects/Zerg-Production/Zergwallet/Zergwallet|Zergwallet]]. The recipe generalizes to any new Zerg product:

1. `cd ~/zerg && mkdir <appname> && cd <appname>`
2. `claude --dangerously-skip-permissions`
3. `/rename <appname>`
4. Paste a bootstrap prompt referencing `~/zerg/zergboard` and `~/zerg/zchat` as patterns to mimic (both use the ZTC embedded chat agent)
5. Use a branch like `zstack/<appname>` to keep work isolated

## Related

- [[Epoch/Projects/Zergboard Snapshot|Zergboard Snapshot]] — board-level pull from the zergboard-skill
- [[Epoch/Projects/Product Glossary|Product Glossary]] — context on Zerg, ZDE, ZTC, ZStack as engineering layer
- [[Projects/Zerg-Production/Zstack/ZTC|ZTC]] — internal engineering-platform source of truth and Slack-sourced evidence capture

positioning.elevator_pitch: ZergStack expense management is the agent-native corporate spend platform for teams whose expense operations should be run by their software agents, not their finance staff.
core_differentiator_lines: Agents file, approve, and reconcile — humans just spot-check.
Single-use virtual cards for every vendor, every subscription.
Global reimbursements in one flow, no per-country bolt-ons.
Built on ZergStack — same runtime as your CRM, chat, and calendar.
No political CEO emails, no Turkers reading your receipts.

headline_candidates.headline: Expenses your agents can actually run.
headline_candidates.subhead: Filing, approvals, reconciliation, and close — automated end-to-end by agents that live inside your stack.

headline_candidates.headline: One virtual card per vendor. One reimbursement flow per planet.
headline_candidates.subhead: Single-use cards and global reimbursements — the two gaps Brex, Ramp, and Concur still haven't closed.

headline_candidates.headline: Concur without the horror show.
headline_candidates.subhead: Modern UX, agent-native automation, and a company that isn't going to email your users about politics.

headline_candidates.headline: Expense management that ships as fast as your product does.
headline_candidates.subhead: Same ZergStack runtime as Zergboard, ZergChat, and ZergCal — one deploy target, one identity, one audit log.

headline_candidates.headline: Your receipts don't go to Mechanical Turk.
headline_candidates.subhead: Agent-run OCR and coding, on infrastructure you control — no third-party humans reading employee data.

messaging_pillars.promise: Every expense workflow — capture, coding, approval, reconciliation, close — is designed for an agent to run and a human to audit.
proof_points: Agents draft GL codes and route approvals via ZergChat
Daily close automation with human sign-off, not human data entry
Machine-readable audit trail per transaction, per agent action

messaging_pillars.promise: The two features every finance team asks for and nobody ships: single-use virtual cards per vendor, and truly global reimbursements.
proof_points: Vendor-scoped single-use cards kill subscription sprawl and card-testing fraud
One reimbursement flow across currencies and countries — no per-region product

messaging_pillars.pillar: One stack, one identity, one audit log
messaging_pillars.promise: Expense is a module of ZergStack — not a silo you integrate over months.
proof_points: Same identity, permissions, and deploy target as Zergboard, ZergChat, ZergCal, ZergMail
Approvals happen in ZergChat, receipts land from ZergMail, calendar context from ZergCal
One audit log across expense, comms, and calendar — not five vendor exports

messaging_pillars.pillar: Boring in the ways that matter
messaging_pillars.promise: No political email blasts, no receipts shipped to third-party humans, no pivot away from your segment.
proof_points: No third-party human OCR pipeline — agents run on your infrastructure
No customer-list political campaigns from the CEO
No historic pattern of firing your customer segment (see: Brex SMB)

anti_pitch: We are not a card company with expense software bolted on — cards are a feature of a spend platform, not the product (avoids Brex's identity crisis).
We are not a marketing megaphone for the CEO — customer email is for product, not politics (avoids Expensify's 10M-customer political blast pattern).
We are not an enterprise procurement suite retrofitted with a mobile app — we won't ship the 'software horror show' UX Concur is famous for on HN.
We are not a travel-first product pretending to do expense — we won't split your workflow across a T&E silo (avoids Navan's replicable-receipt-scan critique).
We are not a data broker — receipts and vendor data stay inside your ZergStack, never routed to third-party humans (avoids Expensify Turker incident).
We are not chasing IPO optics — we are chasing agent-native workflow depth (avoids Navan's rocky-debut narrative).
positioning.icp_refinement: Agent-forward operators at 20-500 person companies already running (or planning to run) multiple ZergStack products — finance/ops leaders who see expense as an automation problem, not a card-perks problem, and who are actively burned by Concur's UX, Brex's SMB pivot, or Expensify's data-handling history. Sweet spot: multi-currency teams with global contractors who need real reimbursements, not US-first workarounds.

objection_handling.objection: Brex/Ramp are free and have huge card rewards — why pay you?
objection_handling.response: Those are card businesses monetizing interchange; the software is the loss-leader. If you're building an agent-run finance function, you need the software to be first-class and the card to be a primitive — including single-use virtual cards per vendor, which neither ships.

objection_handling.objection: Concur is the enterprise standard — nobody gets fired for buying it.
objection_handling.response: Concur is also the enterprise standard for HN horror-show threads (356 upvotes, then another 198, then 181). The 'safe' choice is now the reputational risk — and it can't be run by agents.
Expensify shipped customer receipts to Mechanical Turkers and blasted 10M customers about a presidential election. 'Mature' isn't the same as 'safe to put your employee data through.'

objection_handling.objection: Navan already does travel + expense in one product.
objection_handling.response: Navan is a travel product with expense attached — and HN devs openly say the receipt scan is replicable. We're expense-first, agent-native, and don't need you to book flights through us to justify the platform.

objection_handling.objection: You're early — table-stakes gaps (ERP integrations, approval workflows, multi-currency) aren't closed yet.
objection_handling.response: Correct — and we're closing them in a specific order driven by agent-run workflows, not procurement checklists. Early customers get input on sequencing; we publish what's shipped vs. spec'd in the open.

objection_handling.objection: Why buy expense from an infrastructure company?
objection_handling.response: Because your expense workflow already spans chat, calendar, email, and tasks. Buying it as a module of the same stack means one identity, one audit log, one deploy target — not another vendor integration to babysit.
